votes.rationale: Motion-0042 successfully added a deterministic task-local code surface pack generator for code-heavy Claude sessions. The generated pack now compiles a bounded set of relevant code files with canonical paths, stable ordering, bounded excerpts, and a valid manifest sidecar.

The motion stayed appropriately scoped. It reduced manual file gathering without drifting into whole-repo dumping, semantic retrieval, or canonical-truth replacement. The resulting pack is compact, path-oriented, and practically useful.

The implementation is coherent and strategically useful. The task-local code surface pack now gives dev-jai-nexus a reusable middle layer between motion/bootstrap context and raw source files, improving the setup path for code-heavy Claude work.
